title: Xray (Spectator)
description: You can now see ores in spectator mode!
body:
If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then [join my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be85f5c26a57a9efc1200cedad2891b43571459a.png)
Hello there! Have you ever wanted to see ores when you're in spectator mode? Well now you can! With this texture pack, you can see ores after you died in a game or just if you're a spectator.

This isn't a cheat, it doesn't give any unfair advantage. Rather, it's more of a thing to help you find cheaters on your server or have a better experience spectating in gamemodes like UHC. Specator mode gives you the ability to see caves through walls, I don't see why you shouldn't be allowed to see ores too! ### Pack Enabled: ![spectator_xray.png](https://imagedelivery.net/aG82t-qDLn415HP9HHoOeg/ee0640de-8f10-429b-297d-79c9ace98500/original) ### Pack Disabled: ![spectator_noxray.png](https://imagedelivery.net/aG82t-qDLn415HP9HHoOeg/eecb18b9-1b5c-4d7d-8a5f-97918ebe9d00/original)
Issues Hey, if you find an issue or want to suggest something, please contact me with my discord. I will usually respond fairly quickly if you need help
Discord: AlphaLeoli#6338 Discord Server! YouTube: AlphaLeoli
https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
